## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî New feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî Code restructure (no logic change)
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî Tooling / CI / dependency update
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî Documentation only
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî Tests only
- [ ] `perf` ‚Äî Performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] No `print()` / `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] Migrations included (if model changes)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if new env vars added)
- [ ] Docs updated (if API / architecture changed)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
